title: KESIN-TEST: value + EDGE-2 + 52wk-high on the D-202 clean universe (681 symbols) -- Stage 0 pre-registration
decision_owner: maintainer. Harness MEASURES + RECOMMENDS; does NOT finalize deployment. Even a GERCEK-EDGE verdict is an overlay CANDIDATE at most (separate maintainer decision).
discipline_note: Committed BEFORE any D-203 gate result is computed and BEFORE any result is seen. The engine (src/screening/d203_clean_universe_test.py) REFUSES to run unless this file exists. The 5-gate rule + the 3-way verdict are FROZEN here and will NOT be relaxed post-hoc (no threshold lowering, no window/lookback widening, no factor redefinition, no regime-boundary tuning). N<=3 candidates; MEASUREMENT-ONLY, composite-weight optimization FORBIDDEN (equal-weight rank average only). Snapshot content-hashes recorded below; the run reads these frozen offline snapshots and asserts the hashes match.
motivation: Two junction-shared exploration labs (local build-homed, NOT committed) reached OPPOSITE conclusions. edge-arastirma (88 survivors, 30 tests): VALUE is a survivorship/small-cap MIRAGE; no factor beats a random basket; the only signal passing all tradeability gates is 52wk-high momentum, but it is a 2022-26 REGIME-TILT, not regime-invariant alpha. edge-arastirma: an EDGE-2 COMPOSITE (mom120 + hi52 + lowvol63, monthly top-15 EW) is the STRONGEST edge and (EDGE-6) 'widens to +12.9pp above EW on the full universe, survivorship-confirmed'. CRITICAL: EDGE-6 used the BROKEN D-200 universe (392 names, 291 complex-corp-action names wrongly excluded, rights/TERP unadjusted, daily returns clipped at +/-50%) -> its claim is INVALID. D-203 re-measures all three candidates on the CORRECTED D-202 681-symbol universe with ONE shared 5-gate methodology to resolve the contradiction.
honest_expectation: edge-arastirma is the more careful lab; we EXPECT VALUE -> SERAP and 52wk-high -> REGIME-TILT to replicate on the clean universe, and we expect the EDGE-2 +12.9pp claim to SHRINK or collapse once the D-200 artifacts (wrong universe, +/-50% clip) are removed. A SERAP/REGIME-TILT verdict is a clean 'tried-and-refuted' archive result, not a failure.
basis: edge-arastirma FINDINGS.md sec.7/sec.11 (VALUE = survivorship/small-cap mirage), sec.5 (selection-null), sec.27-28 (52wk-high regime tilt)
edge-arastirma REPORT_SMART.md EDGE-2 composite + EDGE-6 full-universe +12.9pp claim (D-200-broken; README_JUNCTION.md caveat)
D-202 DATA_STORE_LAYOUT.md (681 symbols x 1848 days, price content-hash fd207550..., mode yol-3-hybrid)
D-203 FAZ-0 universal fundamentals freeze (degoran archive, content-hash d72a6977..., 677/681 covered)
D-191 k2_factor_tilt armored-backtest infra (to_real, block_bootstrap_ci, fair null) reused READ-ONLY
D-187 frozen daily TUFE index (exposure_d187_tufe) reused READ-ONLY
hypothesis: On the corrected D-202 clean universe, a monthly-rebalanced top-15 equal-weight tilt for each candidate carries a REGIME-RESILIENT, liquidity-robust, after-cost NET excess over the honest delisted-inclusive EW_FULL benchmark -- positive on BOTH sides of the primary 2022-01 regime split. NULL/expectation: VALUE is a survivorship/small-cap mirage (SERAP); 52wk-high and the EDGE-2 composite are post-2022 regime tilts (REJIM-TILT), not regime-invariant edges.
what_this_is_NOT: NOT an optimization (no weight tuning, no fraction sweep, fixed top-15). NOT a deployment decision (overlay CANDIDATE at most). NOT a re-use of the labs' broken survivor snapshots -- D-203 consumes the UNIVERSAL junctioned D-202 price panel + the degoran-sourced fundamentals freeze. The two regime splits and the two windows are two VIEWS of the same measurement -> NOT sweep variants, do NOT count against N<=3.

candidates_N_lock.rule: N<=3 candidates; the only candidates are the three the two labs disagree about.
candidates_N_lock.value: ADAY-A VALUE-ONLY: book-to-market bm=equity/mktval (=1/PBV) PRIMARY; earnings yield ey=net_profit/mktval E/P robustness. Higher = cheaper = long. Fundamentals lagged >=1 month (look-ahead safe).
candidates_N_lock.edge2: ADAY-B EDGE-2 COMPOSITE: equal-weight cross-sectional rank average of mom120 (120d momentum, skip recent 21d) + hi52 (52wk-high proximity) + lowvol63 (inverted 63d realized vol). The core contradiction.
candidates_N_lock.value_robustness: ey (E/P) reported alongside bm; NOT a separate candidate.

universe.survivorship: survivorship-CLEAN (delisted KOZAA/IPEKE/KOZAL etc. present) -> EW_FULL benchmark is delisted-inclusive (honest bar), unlike the labs' survivor-only snapshots.

primary_common.rationale: degoran fundamentals + TUFE overlap; all THREE candidates compared apples-to-apples (maintainer correction-2).

extended.rationale: price-only candidates ALSO reported on the longer window; the window difference is stated explicitly in the verdict.

rebalance: monthly (last trading day of each calendar month) -> matches the edge-arastirma EDGE-2 monthly top-15 cadence (~82 month-ends on the common window).
benchmark_FROZEN: EW_FULL = equal-weight per-period return of the ENTIRE eligible universe each month, delisted-inclusive (a name that delists mid-period contributes its partial compounded return). This is the honest bar; long-15 excess is measured geometrically over it.
return_cleaning_FROZEN: daily simple returns clipped to +/-10% (D203_DAILY_RETURN_CLIP) -- NOT the broken D-200 +/-50% clip. Buy-and-hold equal-weight compounding within each month.

selection_FROZEN.long: fixed top-15 by score (D203_TOP_N=15); EW basket = min(15, pool).
selection_FROZEN.short_leg: fixed bottom-15 -> long-short spread nets out beta + survivorship.
selection_FROZEN.no_fraction_sweep: fixed N, not a tercile/quintile fraction -> no optimization path.

regime_splits_FROZEN.rationale: PRIMARY 2022-01-01 is a calendar-year boundary matching the directive language '2019-21 vs 2022-26'; TR inflation regime accelerated end-2021 into 2022 (NOT arbitrary). SECONDARY 2022-07-01 matches the edge-arastirma/edge-arastirma continuity and the TLREF-carry data start (maintainer correction-1). A period is assigned to a side by its START date. Both splits + this rationale are written into the results JSON.

cost_tax_FROZEN.application: cost_i = one_way_turnover_i * (bps/1e4); turnover = 0.5*sum|w_new-w_old| (EW). First entry charged as a full round trip (conservative).
cost_tax_FROZEN.tax: BIST equities 0% capital gains; 15% dividend-withholding drag at 3% assumed yield (caveat in report). NOTE: flat 20/100bp, NOT the broker-tier model -- gates require a flat per-turnover cost.

return_basis_FROZEN.ew_full_relative: geometric excess of long-15 over EW_FULL ((1+long)/(1+ewfull)-1); CPI cancels so this equals the real excess.
return_basis_FROZEN.long_short: top15 - bottom15 net spread (reported; gates the SERAP mirage check).
return_basis_FROZEN.xu100_proxy: EW of bist100-flagged constituents (proxy; REPORTED, never a gate).

fair_null_FROZEN.design: at each rebalance draw the SAME 15 names uniformly without replacement from the SAME eligible pool; same dates/holding/tax, cost=0 -> randomizes ONLY name selection.
fair_null_FROZEN.statistic: full-window mean per-period net TL-real return
fair_null_FROZEN.pass: strategy real mean >= 95th percentile of the null (random_pctile >= 0.95)

significance_FROZEN.newey_west: HAC Bartlett SE of the mean of the EW_FULL-relative per-period series; lags=3 (monthly non-overlapping). gate2 = |mean/SE| >= 2.0.
significance_FROZEN.block_bootstrap: 95% CI of the per-period series; block=1, n_boot=2000, seed=12345 (reused K2 knobs).

five_gates_FROZEN.gate1_selection_null: top-15 real return beats >= 95th pctile of matched random baskets (isolates selection skill).
five_gates_FROZEN.gate2_newey_west: HAC |t| >= 2.0 on the EW_FULL-relative series (selection excess, not market beta).
five_gates_FROZEN.gate3_cross_regime: EW_FULL-relative positive on BOTH sides of the PRIMARY 2022-01 split (single-side INSUFFICIENT). SECONDARY 2022-07 reported.
five_gates_FROZEN.gate4_liquidity: within the LIQUID value_tl tercile (trailing-63d median), the relative edge survives (>0) -> not a small-cap mirage.
five_gates_FROZEN.gate5_after_cost: EW_FULL-relative stays > 0 at BOTH 20bp AND 100bp per-turnover cost.

verdict_rule_FROZEN_3way.precedence: SERAP (mirage) check first, then GERCEK-EDGE, then REJIM-TILT, then SERAP (eliminated fallthrough).
verdict_rule_FROZEN_3way.SERAP_mirage: EW_FULL-relative mean <= 0 OR long-short mean < 0 OR liquidity collapse (edge only in the illiquid tercile, not the liquid one).
verdict_rule_FROZEN_3way.GERCEK_EDGE: all 5 gates pass AND both regimes positive (gate-3 both_positive).
verdict_rule_FROZEN_3way.REJIM_TILT: gates 1,2,4,5 pass but only the post-2022 regime is positive (gate-3 only_post_positive) -> regime tilt, not regime-invariant alpha.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_3way.SERAP_eliminated_fallthrough: any candidate that is neither GERCEK-EDGE nor REJIM-TILT and is not flagged SERAP_mirage (i.e. fails >=1 gate while nominally positive -- typically the significance gate) is ELIMINATED and labeled SERAP with the failed-gate list. This fallthrough only WIDENS the eliminated bucket; it can never move a candidate toward GERCEK-EDGE, so it is not a relaxation.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_3way.no_post_hoc_relaxation: the 5 gates and their thresholds are frozen; not loosened after seeing results.

thresholds_reference.gate_decision_constants: src/signals/thresholds.py D203_* block (D203_GATE_NULL_PCTILE=0.95, D203_GATE_NW_T_MIN=2.0, D203_GATE_COST_LOW_BPS=20, D203_GATE_COST_HIGH_BPS=100, D203_DAILY_RETURN_CLIP=0.10, D203_LIQUIDITY_TERCILE=1/3, D203_TOP_N=15) -- single source per the PROJECT_GUIDE.md tek-kaynak mandate + CLEAN_UNIVERSE_* precedent.
thresholds_reference.measurement_geometry: src/screening/d203_config.py (lookbacks, regime splits, windows, snapshot hashes); re-exports the gate constants for a single engine import surface.

outputs: docs/yol1/d203_results.json (after run: per candidate x window -> 5 gates + both regime splits + verdict)
docs/research/D-203-rapor.md (per-candidate verdict + contradiction resolution; window + split differences stated)
